✨ Refactor docs site: Console-first sidebar, marketplace, quick install, Live Demo (#1212)

* Modified Hero section and Docs overview to promote console

Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* Update src/app/docs/page.mdx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* Update src/components/master-page/HeroSection.tsx

* Update src/components/master-page/HeroSection.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* Update src/components/master-page/HeroSection.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* Update src/app/docs/page.mdx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* Update src/app/docs/page.mdx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* Update src/components/docs/DocsSidebar.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* Update public/config/shared.json

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* fixing Docs home link color

Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* removed obsolete sections from hero page

Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>

* ✨ Refactor docs site: Console-first sidebar, marketplace, quick install, Live Demo links

- Reorder sidebar: Console, KubeStellar MCP, A2A at top; KubeStellar, KubeFlex, Multi Plugin in collapsed Legacy section
- Rewrite marketplace page to fetch from console-marketplace registry.json with search, type/tag filters, and card grid
- Rewrite quick installation page for Console: one-liner curl|bash, GitHub OAuth setup, .env reference, alternative install methods (brew, docker, helm)
- Replace all Playground links with Live Demo (console.kubestellar.io, new tab) in Navbar, DocsNavbar, Footer, DocsFooter
- Update all locale files (en, ja, de, zh-CN, pt, it, fr, hi, zh-TW, es, SC, TC) playground→liveDemo
- Remove terminal output simulation from HeroSection
- Replace legacy install cards with single Console card in GetStartedSection
- Update shared.json relatedProjects with legacy flags

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix lint errors: remove leftover code in marketplace, unused import in quick-install

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix TS type error: add legacy field to RelatedProject interface

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Make hero title span full page width

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Simplify hero command: remove terminal chrome, just show curl command with copy button

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix: fetch local shared.json first so previews use branch config (legacy sidebar)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Refocus landing page on Console: update about/use-cases/contact, remove legacy refs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Add 'Get Started with KubeStellar Console' heading above curl command

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Replace standalone KubeStellar with KubeStellar Console across landing page strings

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Update footer description and products page for Console branding

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Point GitHub star/fork/watch links to kubestellar/console

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Remove 'Select a KubeStellar Component' header from docs sidebar

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Move legacy project nav into collapsed Legacy sidebar section

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Make Console the default: redirect /docs to /docs/console/readme

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Kevin Roche <kproche@us.ibm.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
